hero.title: Play in a friendly space
hero.description: A huge 3-floor indoor playground for kids aged 1–9. Sit back with the little ones and enjoy it too. A café, a private birthday room and a warm, welcoming team.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.note: * Admission covers one child and one guardian. Each additional guardian is +20 ₪. Daily entry.

birthday.title: Celebrate a birthday at Baloona!
birthday.description: Two hours of fun with free access to the attractions, a private room, pizza for every child and a cake ceremony by our team. From 1,990 ₪ for 25 kids.

contact.eyebrow: Leave us a message — we'll get back to you during opening hours
contact.title: Contact us

items.text: The place is amazing, the kids didn't want to leave! Clean, safe and the staff are simply lovely. We already booked a birthday.
items.name: Michal L.

items.text: Finally a place parents enjoy too. The coffee is great and the kids play safely. Highly recommend!
items.name: Dana C.

items.text: We celebrated our son's birthday and everything was perfect — private room, pizza and a cake ceremony. Thank you, Baloona team!
items.name: Yossi A.

footer.tagline: An indoor playground and birthday venue for kids aged 1–9 in Kiryat Ono.
footer.address: 37 Shlomo HaMelech St. (Kiryat Ono Mall), Building B, floor -2
